title: leucosceptrum plectranthoideum
intro: Leucosceptrum plectranthoideum, also known as the White Spirea, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucosceptrum plectranthoideum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to help manage respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Leucosceptrum plectranthoideum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed as teas or taken as supplements.
